CONTENT.Honours: Zenit Saint PetersburgRussian Premier League: 2018–19, 2019–20, 2020–21Russian Cup: 2019–20Russian Super Cup: 2020
CONTENT.Club career: He made his debut in the Russian Football National League for Zenit-2 St. Petersburg on 11 July 2016 in a game against Sokol Saratov.He scored his first goal for Zenit-2 in the Russian Football National League match against Avangard Kursk on 12 August 2018.In February 2019, he was moved to Zenit's main squad, and appeared during UEFA Europa League match on 21 February 2019, when Zenit won 3–1 against Fenerbahçe. He made his Russian Premier League debut for the club on 14 April 2019 in a game against Anzhi Makhachkala, as an 86th-minute substitute for Artem Dzyuba.On 29 January 2021, he signed a 5-year contract with Russian club Rubin Kazan.On 3 July 2024, Musayev moved to Russian First League club Rodina Moscow.
CONTENT.External links: Profile by Russian Football National LeagueLeon Musayev at Soccerway

SUMMARY: Leon Narimanovich Musayev (Russian: Леон Нариманович Мусаев; born 25 January 1999) is a Russian footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Rodina Moscow.
